sizing_rule.note: Use Lagrangian optimization to derive optimal position size (optimal_f) from constrained linear programming solution. Do NOT round to convenient share quantities—precision is critical. Deviation from optimal sizing causes 0.2%–6.5% performance degradation. optimal_f derived from Lagrangian multipliers after elementary row transformation and division by 0.5.

source_rule_text: Position sizing should be calculated at the optimal level rather than rounded to convenient share quantities, as deviating from optimal sizing can significantly reduce portfolio performance.
